rationale: Review 1 correctly flags the fragile `simpa` in `antipode_comp` (lines 47–55) where non-obvious convolution goals are closed via unfolding-heavy context — a real proof-quality issue confirmed in the diff. Review 2's additional findings on `ext; induction; simp` in private lemmas are standard mathlib practice and not genuinely brittle, making Review 1 more focused and useful.
